text.title: Agent Drafts Spec Before Coding Examples
text.summary: One worked example: a feature ticket for adding a CSV export endpoint that exercises the spec gate end-to-end.

example.description: Linear ticket LIN-321 "Add CSV export to /reports". Agent posts spec comment; reviewer thumbs-up; agent implements + opens PR.
example.code:
## Current state `/reports` endpoint returns JSON only; the only export path is "right-click → save as". No CSV serializer in the codebase; pandas not on the dependency tree.
## Desired state `GET /reports?format=csv` returns text/csv with a stable column order. Default behaviour (no `format=`) remains JSON for backwards compatibility. Column order taken from `ReportRow.__fields__` to stay in sync with the JSON serializer.
## Proposed plan 1. Add `format` query parameter to the `/reports` handler. 2. Implement `csv_serialize(rows: list[ReportRow]) -> str` in `services/exports.py` using `csv.DictWriter`. 3. Add tests: (a) format=csv returns text/csv, (b) format omitted returns JSON, (c) empty rows produce header-only CSV. 4. Document in `docs/api.md`.
No new dependencies. Estimated change: 4 files, ~80 LOC.
